title: Software Engineer, Test and Telemetry
bullets: Developed Telviz, Boom's real-time telemetry visualization system used across 15 hardware system test events so far, as the primary contributor
Enhanced Go backend server, orchestrating concurrent processes using channels and asynchronous patterns
Built a custom Web Components frontend enabling users to configure screens for monitoring real-time test data
Collaborated with stakeholders to define test visualization requirements and delivered components including plots, gauges, and indication lights
Developed hardware commanding features (valves, pumps, and more) using representative switches and knobs rendered in browser, with a key checkout mechanism to restrict control to one user at a time
Automated post-test data uploads and processing, reducing data availability from 1.5 hours to under 20 minutes

title: Avionics Flight Test Engineer
bullets: Served as responsible engineer in the XB-1 (Boom's supersonic demonstrator aircraft) flight test control room, monitoring and troubleshooting avionics and telemetry systems during flight test events
Analyzed post-event data and presented findings at program data reviews, with actionable recommendations for subsequent missions
Updated aircraft data retrieval and processing scripts, simplifying the workflow and reducing turnaround time
Extended XB-1's MATLAB flight data analysis suite with new visualization features

title: Avionics Design Engineer
bullets: Led ATA 31, 34, and 46 systems development in preparation for the Overture Design Readiness Review
Authored system Concept of Operation, Technical Requirements, and Statement of Work documentation
Contributed to Flight Deck maturation and ARP-4754B process and V&V tooling across multiple working groups
Designed and developed flyable Primary and Multi-Function Displays for the Overture POD Simulator using GL Studio

title: Avionics Systems Intern
bullets: Designed a breakout box integrating three standby displays into an avionics test bench, directly supporting supplier selection
Performed Safety of Flight software testing to support verification of a new avionics software release
Collaborated with suppliers and test pilots to develop a concept of operations and UI for a new Autobrake system
